Logic Analysis: Contains functions for interacting with local storage (getTeamMembers, saveTeamMembers, getFeedbacks, saveFeedbacks). No dependencies.
Component for adding new team members. Depends on React. Interacts with App component via props (onClose, onAdd).
Component for displaying a team member card. Depends on React. Interacts with TeamMemberList component via props (teamMember, isSelected, onSelect).
Component for displaying a list of team members. Depends on React and TeamMemberCard. Interacts with App component via props (teamMembers, selectedTeamMemberId).
Component for displaying a single feedback item. Depends on React.
Component for displaying a list of feedback items. Depends on React and FeedbackCard.
Component for inputting feedback. Depends on React. Interacts with App component via props (selectedTeamMemberId, onSaveFeedback).
Contains global styles and dark mode theme using styled-components. No dependencies.
Main application component. Depends on all other components and local storage. Manages state and data flow.
Shared Knowledge: Local storage keys will be 'teamMembers' and 'feedbacks'. The dark mode theme should use dark backgrounds and light text. A default date and time format (MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS) will be used for feedback timestamps. A simple toast message will be displayed after saving feedback or adding a team member.
Anything UNCLEAR: The specific styling details for the dark mode UI are not fully defined (e.g., exact color palette, card shadow styles). The desired avatar style (initials, generic icon, or ability to upload images) is not specified. Clarification on these visual aspects would be beneficial.
